name: Mellanox Technologies, Ltd.
description: Mellanox Technologies, Ltd. was a leading supplier of end-to-end Ethernet and InfiniBand intelligent interconnect solutions and services for servers, storage, and hyper-converged infrastructure. The company's products, including adapters, switches, software, and cables, were designed to increase data center efficiency by providing high throughput and low latency. Founded in Israel, Mellanox became a critical player in high-performance computing and data center networking before being acquired by NVIDIA in 2020. Its technologies continue to serve as the foundation for modern AI factories and large-scale cloud computing environments globally.
